theme.vibe: Authoritative, competitive, tactical, high-contrast, premium sports media

headings.usage: Match scores, Group titles, Player/Team names, Main metrics

body.usage: Data tables, timestamps, TV channels, secondary text

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Dense and scannable for match lists (control room grid), generous for user dashboard summary.
layout_and_spacing.match_row: flex items-center justify-between py-3 border-b border-border/40 hover:bg-surface_hover transition-colors
layout_and_spacing.group_header: flex justify-between items-center bg-muted/20 px-3 py-2 mt-6 rounded-md uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-widest
layout_and_spacing.date_navigation: flex overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap gap-2 py-4 sticky top-0 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-md z-40 no-scrollbar

score_inputs.base: w-12 h-12 text-center text-2xl font-black bg-surface border border-border rounded-md appearance-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:outline-none transition-all
score_inputs.notes: Minimalist, no up/down arrows (appearance-none). Auto-save on blur or debounced.

team_display.flag: w-6 h-4 sm:w-8 sm:h-5 rounded-sm object-cover shadow-sm
team_display.name: font-bold text-sm sm:text-base truncate max-w-[100px] sm:max-w-[150px]

standings_drawer.trigger: Discreet button next to Group Header (e.g., 'Voir le classement')
standings_drawer.content: Data-dense table showing PTS, J, G, N, P, BP, BC, DIFF.

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent_hover font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-primary_text hover:bg-surface_hover font-bold rounded-md px-4 py-2

badges.status: px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-surface border border-border

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Match rows must highlight slightly on hover. Score inputs must receive an accent ring on focus.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use fast, snappy transitions (duration-150 ease-out) for tactical feel.
interactions_and_motion.auto_save: Prediction inputs should auto-save with a debounced request. Show a discreet 'Saved' or 'Check' icon next to the input briefly upon success.

icons.usage: Use bold/stroke-2 variations. Keep them minimal.

hero_background.description: Illuminated soccer stadium at night. Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) for hero or dashboard headers.

auth_background.description: Dark, atmospheric shot of football fans. Use for Login/Register page background with backdrop-blur and dark gradient.

flags_api.instruction: Use a reliable CDN for country flags (e.g., flagcdn.com) using country codes (iso2) mapped to the 48 qualified teams.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over dark surfaces meets WCAG AA standards. Use #A3A3A3 for muted text against #0A0A0A base.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='match-score-input-home', data-testid='standings-trigger-group-a').

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Shadcn UI and add components: sheet, input, button, tabs, card.
Install fonts: Barlow Condensed (Google Fonts) and DM Sans.
Set up Tailwind config with the provided dark/light mode palette using CSS variables.
Ensure 'appearance-none' is used on type='number' inputs to hide default arrows.
Implement debouncing (e.g., via lodash or custom hook) for the score predictions.
Build the UI in French strictly, matching sports media terminology (e.g., '1re journée', 'Classement').
Avoid generic cards for match lists; use flat, dense list rows with 1px border separators.
